quests.title: Step 1 — Start the Resume Tour
quests.description: Meet Guide Byte to begin the guided resume walkthrough and understand what this experience is about.

quests.title: Step 2 — Who Michael Is
quests.description: Reveal the profile card so the viewer immediately understands Michael’s positioning and strengths.

quests.title: Step 3 — Field Credibility
quests.description: Meet the Field Mentor to show practical execution and real-world technical credibility.

quests.title: Step 4 — Systems & Automation
quests.description: Move through the workshop route to reveal how Michael turns work into systems, tools, and leverage.

quests.title: Step 5 — Operations & Leadership
quests.description: Finish the tour by showing operational thinking, coordination, and delivery value.
